---
title: 'Cognitive Computing Safety: The New Horizon for Reliability'
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
- Vijay Janapa Reddi
categories:
- Show All
- Pre-2018 Work
topics:
- robotics
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/ieeemicro17.pdf
journ: IEEE Micro
year: 2017
contrib: Pre-2018 Work
image: featured.png
pub_number: 17
---
